message:
feat(conformance): add repair/fountain conformance vectors, fix mvp_vertical_slice and mesh planner compile errors

13 new repair conformance vectors covering FCP V3 §11.5, §9.8, and
Appendix Z:
- RaptorQ encode/decode roundtrip with exact K source symbols
- Repair vs source symbol ESI separation
- Symbol size consistency with config
- Repair ratio producing extra symbols
- Coverage basis-point semantics
- Placement policy validation and serialization
- GC reason codes stability (8 codes) and decision actions (3 actions)
- Repair reason codes stability
- Repair controller config boundedness

Also fix mvp_vertical_slice.rs zone ownership (clone) and mutable
borrow in gossip filter. Fix fcp-mesh planner AdjustmentFactor::Custom
variant migration (Copy→Clone, update test constructors).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
